name: semantic-seo-builder
description: Koray Semantic SEO pipeline for local businesses. 5-phase: Foundation (customer voice, persona, competitor baseline), Semantic Research (entities, SERP clustering), Topical Map (hub-and-spoke + intent validation), Content (brief→write→factcheck→schema→GEO→images), Technical & Local SEO. Track 2: weekly pipeline + monthly audit. Integrates claude-seo and claude-blog.
